title: Animated Totem of Undying
description: Animates the eyes of the totem
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/51e0441a86c68928cb82b16cf64eb1cc2c006734.png)

### Animates the eyes of the totem, making it blink realistically. You can also change the animation speed in the file, but I’ve already set it to the perfect value. VARIATIONS: - Fullsize-Default — Default size - MiniVersion — Smaller + smaller pop for better visibility - MiniEmissiveEyes — Smaller with glowing eyes + smaller pop for better visibility - FullsizeEmissiveEyes — Default size with glowing eyes - FullsizeEmissiveTotem — Default size with full emissive (entire totem glows) - MiniEmissiveTotem — Smaller with full emissive (entire totem glows) + smaller pop animation for better visibility - Outline — Adds an emissive glowing outline to the totem. All existing variations (MiniVersion, EmissiveEyes, Fullsize, etc.) are also available with this outline.
Animation ![Animation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d1f9b0f840613b44d75451ead32e8e87c8df2145.gif)
[![SparkedHost](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1460304641236668511/1461763448441405532/Artboard_3.png?ex=696bbccc&is=696a6b4c&hm=e337c59f0d19fe2de554a07f4c371d8f6c815247c4ca690bb132b334efe231e9&)](https://billing.sparkedhost.com/aff.php?aff=3089) ![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e5c64d020177eecf024f67de4dbbb20596b664a.jpeg)
